---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or change to a @lesto/* package
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

<!-- Open this BEFORE writing code so we can align on the design. Lesto is
opinionated and batteries-included; a feature that fits the substrate-first,
interface-driven model lands faster. -->

## The problem

What can't you do today, or what's painful?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Lesto to do. Which package(s) would own it?

## Fit with the model

How does this sit with "one substrate, in-house batteries, thin drivers only at
the edges"? Is it core, a driver behind an existing interface, or out of scope?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why you'd not pick them.
